subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath outstripped all others in the service of God, his Lord, the Mighty, the All-Loving [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی سبق ما سواه فی خدمه الله ربه العزیز الودود و قام
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
